The [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] '''Ugnor''', being 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall, was considered by [[Ars Fivvle]] to be the tallest and most noble Ugnaught in the history of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Biography==
Leading the work parties who emigrated from [[Gentes/Legends|Gentes]] to Bespin, his ability to deal with the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Ecclessis Figg/Legends|Ecclessis Figg]] during the construction of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] made him renowned and earned him the title of "[[Ufflor of Ufflors]]."<ref name="Wizards" />

He also assisted in the creation of the [[Ugnaught Mechanics Union]] and was the main supporter of the [[Ugnaught Surface/Legends|Ugnaught Surface's]] construction. His name was used in the Ugnaught expletive ''"Ugnor's thumbs!"''<ref name="Wizards" />
